message:
feat(freeze): add full Zig codegen with closure support

  - zig_runtime.zig: JSValue wrapper, SMI helpers, closure FFI
  - zig_codegen_full.zig: ~80 opcodes including closures
  - native_shapes: foundation for AST node optimization
  - shape_detector: property access pattern analysis
  - Closure opcodes: get_var_ref*, put_var_ref*, stack ops
  - Phase 2.1-2.5 of Zig migration complete

files.patch:
@@ -86,3 +86,9 @@ frozen_functions.c
 claude_bundle_compiled.c
 *.rej
 node-core/
+
+# Generated standalone binaries
+bin/
+fib
+fib_*
+tsc_native
